---
title: "Statistical Report"
subtitle: "Determinants of Belgian Household Energy Consumption"

author: |
  GROUP 6:  
  Morodoluwa Akin-Fajiye  
  Samer Mheissen  
  Blagovesta Hristoskova  
  Jeffrey Nunoo  
  Edoardo Pennesi  
  Muthoni Wachira

date: "`r Sys.Date()`"

output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    number_sections: true
fontsize: 11pt
geometry: margin=1in
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{pdflscape}
  - \usepackage{float}
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

# Libraries
library(gridExtra)

```

\newpage

# Background

Brief intro and maybe literature review

# Dataset and Variables

# Descriptive Statistics

## Categorical variables

### Summary tables

### Summary plots

- box plots

## Continuous variables

### Summary tables

### Summary plots

- box plots,
- correlation plots
- scatter plots, 
- QQ plots,

# Inferential Statistics

## Regression model

## DAGs

## Results table

| Term | Estimate | Std. Error | t value | Pr(>|t|) | adjusted p |
|------|----------|------------|---------|----------| ---------  |

- VIF analysis
- Cross validation analysis


## Diagnostic plots

- Residuals vs Fitted
- Normal Q–Q Plot
- Scale–Location Plot (Spread–Location)
- Residuals vs Leverage
- Influence (Cook’s Distance)

## Contrast analysis

- for research question 2 and 4

# Conclusions

## Research question 1

## Research question 2

## Research question 3

## Research question 4
